ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "primary_care_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's primary care provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_care_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_care_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glucose_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glucose reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who recorded the reading */,
  "bg" REAL /* Blood glucose level */,
  "eq_BG" REAL /* Estimated blood glucose level */,
  "CGM_glucose" REAL /* Continuous glucose monitor glucose level */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Datetime when the reading was taken */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used for the reading */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the reading */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the reading was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glucose_readings_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insulin_doses" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insulin dose entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who administered the dose */,
  "IOB" REAL /* Insulin on board */,
  "rate" REAL /* Insulin delivery rate */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Datetime when the insulin was administered */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used for the dose */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the dose */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the dose was administered */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insulin_doses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device status entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient using the device */,
  "running_temp" REAL /* Running temperature of the device */,
  "unsafe_action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any unsafe actions recorded */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Datetime when the status was recorded */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Datetime of the last sync with the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Provider's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Provider's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number */,
  "practice_address" TEXT /* Address of the provider's practice */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the provider has been practicing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider for the appointment */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Datetime for the scheduled appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the appointment is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining */,
  "last_refill_date" TEXT /* Date of the last refill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Critical, Reminder) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Datetime when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_date" TEXT /* Datetime when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Datetime when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for the summary */,
  "average_bg" REAL /* Average blood glucose level during the period */,
  "highest_bg" REAL /* Highest blood glucose level during the period */,
  "lowest_bg" REAL /* Lowest blood glucose level during the period */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the summary */,
  "average_eq_BG" REAL /* Average estimated blood glucose level during the period */,
  "average_CGM_glucose" REAL /* Average continuous glucose monitor glucose level during the period */,
  "average_IOB" REAL /* Average insulin on board during the period */,
  "number_of_readings" INTEGER /* Total number of readings in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_summary_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relation of the family member to the patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Family member's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Family member's last name */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the family member */,
  "emergency_contact" INTEGER /* Whether the family member is an emergency contact */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caregivers" (
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caregiver */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "caregiver_name" TEXT /* Caregiver's name */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Caregiver's contact information */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the caregiver to the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" INTEGER /* Whether the caregiver is an emergency contact */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caregiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caregivers_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Patient, Provider, Caregiver) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Datetime of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Datetime of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
